service.description: Generates a SWIFT MT700 message from a LetterOfCredit and saves it as an LcDocument.

service-call.name: create#moqui.trade.finance.LcDocument
service-call.in-map: [lcId:lcId, documentTypeEnumId:'LC_DOC_SWIFT_MSG', documentReference:('MT700_' + lcId), documentDate:ec.user.nowTimestamp, description:'System Generated MT700', contentLocation:'dbresource://trade-finance/lc/swift/' + lcId + '_MT700.txt', uploadedByUserId:ec.user.userId]

service.description: Generates a SWIFT MT707 message for an LC Amendment.

service-call.name: create#moqui.trade.finance.LcDocument
service-call.in-map: [lcId:lcId, documentTypeEnumId:'LC_DOC_SWIFT_MSG', documentReference:('MT707_' + amendmentSeqId), documentDate:ec.user.nowTimestamp, description:'System Generated MT707 Amendment Advice', contentLocation:'dbresource://trade-finance/lc/swift/' + lcId + '_MT707_' + amendmentSeqId + '.txt', uploadedByUserId:ec.user.userId]

service.description: Generates a SWIFT MT799 free-format message.

service-call.name: create#moqui.trade.finance.LcDocument
service-call.in-map: [lcId:lcId, documentTypeEnumId:'LC_DOC_SWIFT_MSG', documentReference:('MT799_' + System.currentTimeMillis()), documentDate:ec.user.nowTimestamp, description:'System Generated MT799: ' + subject, contentLocation:'dbresource://trade-finance/lc/swift/' + lcId + '_MT799_' + System.currentTimeMillis() + '.txt', uploadedByUserId:ec.user.userId]

service.description: Generates a SWIFT MT734 message for Drawing Refusal.

service-call.name: create#moqui.trade.finance.LcDocument
service-call.in-map: [lcId:lcId, documentTypeEnumId:'LC_DOC_SWIFT_MSG', documentReference:('MT734_' + drawingSeqId), documentDate:ec.user.nowTimestamp, description:'System Generated MT734 Drawing Refusal', contentLocation:'dbresource://trade-finance/lc/swift/' + lcId + '_MT734_' + drawingSeqId + '.txt', uploadedByUserId:ec.user.userId]
